title: Year One Complete: December 2026
author: Anonymous Researcher
Chronicles Archive
description: 2026 wrapped: 23 NDAs signed, 4 projects I can't discuss, tech that won't be public for 5-10 years. First year reflections on building the future—and questioning if we should.
content:
**October 29, 2026**

Halloween party at the lab. Someone came dressed as "aligned AGI."

Everyone laughed nervously.

The alignment team did not think it was funny.

---

**November 17, 2026**

Milestone: The thing we've been building for 11 months just passed its first real-world test. Can't say what it does. But it worked exactly as designed.

Team lead's reaction: "Well, that's terrifying."

We celebrated anyway. 🍾

---

**December 31, 2026**

2026 wrapped. This year I:
- Signed 23 NDAs
- Worked on 4 projects I can't discuss
- Saw tech that won't be public for 5-10 years
- Questioned the wisdom of building it (often)

2027: We're going bigger. Way bigger.

---

First year: Excitement outweighed fear.

That balance wouldn't last.

— *Recovered from personal archive, 2030*

**Related Chronicles:**
- [The Build-Up Series](/articles?tag=backstory)
- [Neural Implant Rejection (2030)](/articles/neural-implant-rejection-2030)
